challenge.title: Napravi Grupu Radio Dugmica
challenge.description:
Mozete koristiti radio dugmice za pitanja gde zelite da korisnik izabere samo jedan odgovor od vise ponudjenih.

Radio dugmad su tip input elementa.

Svako radio dugme moze biti ugnjezdeno unutar svog label elementa. Kada obuhvatite input element unutar label elementa, radio unos se automatski povezuje sa labelom koja ga okruzuje.

Sva povezana radio dugmad treba da imaju isti name atribut kako bi cinila jednu radio grupu. U radio grupi, izbor jednog dugmeta automatski ponistava izbor ostalih, cime se osigurava da korisnik izabere samo jedan odgovor.

Evo primera radio dugmeta:

<label> 
  <input type="radio" name="indoor-outdoor">Indoor 
</label>

Dobra praksa je da postavite for atribut na label element, sa vrednoscu koja odgovara id atributu odgovarajuceg input elementa. To omogucava pomocnim tehnologijama da uspostave jasnu vezu izmedju labele i povezanog input elementa. Na primer:

<input id="indoor" type="radio" name="indoor-outdoor">
<label for="indoor">Indoor</label>

Takodje mozemo ugnjezditi input element unutar label tagova:

<label for="indoor"> 
  <input id="indoor" type="radio" name="indoor-outdoor">Indoor 
</label>
challenge.instructions: Dodajte par radio dugmica u svoju formu, pri cemu svako treba da bude ugnjezdeno unutar svog label elementa. Jedno treba da ima opciju indoor, a drugo outdoor. Oba treba da dele name atribut sa vrednoscu indoor-outdoor kako bi formirali jednu radio grupu.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
CatPhotoApp

Click here to view more cat photos.

Things cats love:

  • catnip
  • laser pointers
  • lasagna

Top 3 things cats hate:

  1. flea treatment
  2. thunder
  3. other cats

tests.text: Vasa stranica treba da ima dva radio dugmeta.
Vasa radio dugmad treba da imaju name atribut sa vrednoscu indoor-outdoor.
Svaki radio input element treba da bude ugnjezden unutar svog label elementa.
Svaki label element treba da ima zatvarajuci tag.
Jedno radio dugme treba da ima labelu indoor.
Jedno radio dugme treba da ima labelu outdoor.
Svaki radio input element treba da bude dodat unutar form taga.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
The best page ever

Cat ipsum dolor sit amet, jump launch to pounce upon little yarn mouse, bare fangs at toy run hide in litter box until treats are fed. Go into a room to decide you didn't want to be in there anyway. I like big cats and i can not lie kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff. Meow i could pee on this if i had the energy for slap owner's face at 5am until human fills food dish yet scamper. Knock dish off table head butt cant eat out of my own dish scratch the furniture. Make meme, make cute face. Sleep in the bathroom sink chase laser but pee in the shoe. Paw at your fat belly licks your face and eat grass, throw it back up kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
